General.Name: Guanze Medical Information Industry (Holding) Co. Ltd.
General.Description: Guanze Medical Information Industry (Holding) Co., Ltd., an investment holding company, provides medical imaging solutions in the People's Republic of China. The company sells medical imaging film products for hospitals and healthcare institutions. It also offers medical imaging cloud services; and software solutions. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Jinan, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Strategic Emerging Industry Base, Jinan, China
